overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Spider-Man walking through an urban downtown area on a clear autumn day. The character explores a plaza with a golden equestrian monument, crosses a city street, and continues along a sidewalk past a subway entrance and burning trash barrel.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with golden equestrian monument

agents.ego_description: walking around the base of the large golden statue, looking up at the monument details

entered.detail: large golden monument featuring a horse and rider with additional figures on a stone pedestal
tall office tower with reflective glass windows
tall office tower with grid-patterned windows
trees with yellow and orange autumn foliage surrounding the plaza
grey stone tiled ground surface of the pedestrian plaza

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks through an open urban plaza on a sunny autumn day, circling a large golden equestrian statue. The plaza is surrounded by modern glass office towers and trees with fall-colored leaves. The character explores the monument area with no significant events occurring.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza edge transitioning to street intersection

events.description: exits the central plaza monument area and approaches the city street
crosses the asphalt road between parked vehicles at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking through a group of men in black suits and crossing the street between parked cars

notable_agents.action: group of men in black suits standing in a semicircle near the statue base
blue sedan parked at the curb waiting

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt street
dark blue four-door sedan parked at the curb
light silver sedan parked on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Leaving the plaza, Spider-Man passes through a group of men in black suits standing near the monument, then crosses the city street at a crosswalk. The scene transitions from the open plaza to the street level with parked cars visible on both sides.

events.description: passes a burning trash barrel emitting flames and smoke on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the city sidewalk past pedestrians and urban street elements

notable_agents.action: person standing next to the burning trash barrel warming their hands

entered.detail: green metal railings and stairs leading underground with Osborn campaign signage
painted green safety railings along the subway stairwell
green newspaper box on the sidewalk near the subway entrance
metal barrel with open flames and rising smoke on the sidewalk
yellow taxi cab visible on the street

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues along the concrete city sidewalk, passing a subway entrance with green railings and newspaper boxes. The character walks past various pedestrians and urban details, ending with a burning trash barrel where a person stands warming their hands.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, open urban plaza into the dense, gritty details of a city sidewalk. It begins with Spider-Man circling a large golden equestrian statue under a sunny autumn sky, surrounded by glass office towers and colorful fall foliage. As he leaves the monument, the camera follows him past a group of men in black suits and across a city street lined with parked cars. The scene then shifts from the open square to the narrow concrete of the sidewalk, passing a subway entrance with green railings and newspaper boxes. Finally, the movement continues past various pedestrians before coming to a stop near a burning trash barrel where a person stands warming their hands.
